name: doc-holiday
description: Plan and generate a project's documentation with Doc Holiday: turn a site map into ready-to-run prompts and drive the Doc Holiday service via the Doc Holiday MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Plan + generate docs with Doc Holiday
interface.longDescription: Turn a documentation site map into ready-to-run Doc Holiday prompts, and drive the Doc Holiday documentation service through the Doc Holiday's doc_holiday_* MCP tools.
